title: AuditEvent
description:
Represents a standardized security event for SIEM ingestion.

Args: * `timestamp` - Unix epoch seconds when the event was recorded. * `actor_did` - The KERI decentralized identifier initiating the action. * `action` - The specific capability or operation attempted. * `status` - The resolution of the event (e.g., "Success", "Denied"). * `trace_id` - Optional W3C traceparent-compatible trace identifier.

Usage: ```rust use auths_telemetry::build_audit_event; let event = build_audit_event("did:keri:abc...", "assume_role", "Denied", 0); ```
